title: Private Boat Hire Stag Do in Marbella: 2026 Guide
html:
Planning a stag do in Marbella? Renting a private boat from Puerto Banús is the ultimate way to celebrate, with prices from EUR 1,500 for a half-day motor yacht. BoatHire24 connects you directly with verified skippers for an unforgettable day on the Mediterranean.

Where to set off in Marbella

Most private boat hire for stags departs from Puerto Banús, the glamorous marina lined with superyachts and boutiques. You can also start from Marbella's main harbour, Club de Mar, or from La Bajadilla port. A popular route heads east to Cabopino Bay or west to the cliffs of Calahonda. For a longer trip, cruise to the island of Gibraltar's waters (visible on a clear day) or anchor off the exclusive beach club of Nikki Beach.

Puerto Banús offers the widest choice of charter operators, with many based right on the marina. Club de Mar provides a quieter departure point closer to Marbella's old town.

How much does it cost to rent a boat for a stag do in Marbella?

Prices start from EUR 1,200 for a half-day private charter and rise to over EUR 5,000 for a full-day superyacht. The exact cost depends on the boat size, season, and extra services such as a BBQ or water toys. You can browse day charters in Marbella that include fuel and skipper. Expect to pay a premium in peak months (June to September) when demand is highest.

  • Shared day cruise: from EUR 90 per person
  • Small motorboat half-day (8 guests): from EUR 800
  • Catamaran full-day (12 guests): from EUR 2,500
  • Crewed luxury yacht full-day (up to 20 guests): from EUR 4,000

Which boat to rent for a stag do in Marbella

  1. Sunseeker 68 Sport, A spacious motor yacht ideal for a party of 12, with a flybridge and swimming platform. See the Sunseeker 68 Sport charter page for full details and pricing. From EUR 3,200 for a full day.
  2. Lagoon 450 catamaran, Stable and roomy, perfect for 10 guests wanting a relaxed cruise with shaded areas. From EUR 2,000 for a full day.
  3. Azimut 55 Fly, A stylish Italian flybridge yacht with comfortable interiors, sleeping 12 guests. From EUR 2,800 for a full day.
  4. Fairline 46 Phantom, A sporty yet elegant motor yacht for up to 8 guests, great for a more intimate group. From EUR 1,800 for a half day.
  5. Axopar 37 Sun Top, An open day boat for adventurous stags who want to tow a ringo or explore coves. From EUR 1,200 for a half day.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat for a stag do in Marbella?

No, you do not need a licence when you hire a crewed boat, which is the standard for stag parties. All private charters listed on BoatHire24 include a professional skipper and crew, so you can focus on the fun. If you want to self-drive, you need a valid ICC (International Certificate of Competence) or equivalent; the operator will confirm exact requirements. The best season for boating in Marbella runs from May to October, with high season in July and August when the Levante wind can pick up in the afternoons.

Tip: Book a morning trip to avoid the Levante wind and enjoy calmer seas. Many stags then head to a beach club for the afternoon.

At a glance

  • Price band: EUR 800 to EUR 5,000+
  • Peak months: July, August
  • Trip length: Half-day (4 hours) or full-day (8 hours)
  • Capacity: 8 to 20 guests
  • Currency: EUR

Questions about boat rental in Marbella

Can we bring our own food and drink on a private boat charter?

Yes, most operators allow you to bring your own catering, though many offer onboard catering packages with paella or BBQ at an extra cost.

What happens if the weather is bad on the day of our stag do?

Your skipper will assess the conditions and may suggest an alternative route or reschedule; most operators offer a flexible cancellation policy for weather events.

How far in advance should we book a boat for a stag do in Marbella?

For the best choice of boats and dates, book at least two months ahead in 2026, especially for weekends in July and August.

Can we swim and use water toys from the boat?

Absolutely, most charters include stops for swimming and can provide paddleboards, snorkelling gear, and inflatable ringos for an extra fee.

Whether you are planning a stag do or a family day out, booking through the BoatHire24 marketplace ensures you compare verified boats and skippers in Marbella. Owners can also list their own boat on BoatHire24 and start earning income from charters. BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Marbella or list your own.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Marbella and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
